english translation text:
LOOK HOW MUHARRAM HAS FALLEN UPON THOSE IN KARBALA,
THE FLAG (ALAM) OF ABBAS HAS COME BEFORE THEM DRIPPING IN BLOOD

JUST AS THE FLAG WAS FALLING,
AT THE SAME TIME IMAM’S BACK WAS ALSO FALLING

LOOK O’ KARBALA IN ORDER TO SAVE ISLAM,
THE INHERITOR OF ADAM HAS COME WITH HIS FAMILY

O’ CRUEL PEOPLE AT LEAST GIVE HIM FEW DROPS OF WATER,
BECAUSE NOW HIS LIFE IS ABOUT TO DEPART

urdu transliteration text:
Sare Mausam To Guzar Jate Hai Akar LaikinBas Hamesha Ke Liye Mausame Matam Aya
ALL THE SEASONS COME AND GO,
@HujjatELC
Karbala Walon Pe
english translation text: BUT THE SEASON OF MATAM STAYS FOREVER

AS I SAW THE MOON OF MUHARRAM,
MY EYES WERE IMMEDIATELY FILLED WITH TEARS
